title: Backrooms - The Immersive Experience
description: An immersive experience in the backrooms (Perfect for Multiplayer)
body:
**Enter a place that should not exist.**

This immersive horror modpack throws you deep into the endless nightmare of the Backrooms. You will explore multiple unique Backrooms levels, each more disturbing and unsettling than the last.

With **advanced Sound Physics**, every footstep, echo, and distant noise feels real and pulls you deeper into paranoia. Sometimes what you hear is worse than what you see.

The modpack is designed mainly for multiplayer, where the experience becomes even more intense and unpredictable. You can play it alone, but it is highly recommended to play with friends for the full horror experience.

To make playing together effortless, the Essential Mod is included, allowing you and your friends to join each other quickly and easily without complicated setup.

For even deeper immersion, the pack features a **realistic First‑Person View**, giving you the unsettling feeling of truly being inside the Backrooms instead of merely observing them.

Additionally, Simple Voice Chat is installed, enabling **proximity‑based communication** that drastically increases tension. Hearing your friends fade into the distance or hearing something else respond, changes everything.

**Custom horror background music** and ambient tracks constantly build tension and make every moment feel unsafe.

On top of that, the modpack includes many additional improvements and enhancements that deepen immersion, atmosphere, and overall gameplay experience, making the world feel more alive and far more terrifying.

**This is not just a modpack, it is a survival horror experience.**

**Will you find the exit, or will you stay lost in the Backrooms forever.**

### Recommended Setup for the Best Experience
- Play with multiple people, not alone
- Use Simple Voice Chat
- Play in First‑Person View
- Use a headset for directional audio
- Keep Minecraft music enabled
- The resource pack is automatically selected when launching the game, so no manual installation is required
- It is highly recommended not to look at the mod list before playing to avoid spoiling
